# Arm H (2026-06-12-H-01) — Showcase Fan-out Summary

Supervisor: Fable 5. Sources: `scorecard.json` (showcase-fanout.scorecard.v1) and `metrics.json` (m1-replay.metrics.v1) only; individual worker transcripts were not inspected.

## Results

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| Pass rate | **32/32 (100%)** |
| Retries | 1 |
| Wall clock | **160.56 s** (~2 min 41 s) |
| Requests | 33 (32 items + 1 retry) |

The single retry was item-01 (`scrapy/http/cookies.py`): attempt 1 failed the `non_placeholder` check ("`_DummyLock.acquire` docstring is too short or placeholder-like", worker rc 0, 44.1 s) and attempt 2 passed (39.1 s). All other 31 items passed on the first attempt. No timeouts and no non-zero worker exit codes.

Per-attempt wall times ranged from 12.8 s (item-32) to 70.5 s (item-21), median ≈ 31 s.

## Token totals and cost

| Token bucket | Count |
|---|---|
| Prompt tokens | 442 |
| Completion tokens | 154,003 |
| Total tokens | 154,445 |
| Cache creation input tokens | 318,319 |
| Cache read input tokens | 115,170 |

| Cost | USD |
|---|---|
| Worker cloud cost | **$1.4186** |
| Supervisor cloud cost | **$1.5692** |
| Total cloud cost | **$2.9878** |

Note the supervisor cost exceeds the worker cost despite workers producing nearly all completion tokens — supervisor overhead is the majority of spend for this arm.

Peak throughput: 190.6 tok/s best single-request decode (request 3, 9,511 completion tokens); 1,281.9 tok/s peak aggregate over a 1 s window; both derived from usage counts against client wall time, not server timings.

## Instrumentation caveats
